Package de.uka.ilkd.key.control

Class TermLabelVisibilityManager

java.lang.Object

    • isShowLabels

      public boolean isShowLabels()
      Gives the information whether currently term labels should be shown or not.
      Returns:
      A boolean value whether currently term labels should be shown.

    • setShowLabels

      public void setShowLabels(boolean showLabels)
      Set the switch whether term labels should be shown to passed value.
      Parameters:
      showLabels - A boolean value whether term labels should be shown

    • isHidden

      public boolean isHidden(Name labelName)
      Gives the information whether the term label with the passed name is currently hidden.
      Parameters:
      labelName - The name of a term label
      Returns:
      A boolean value whether the investigated term label is hidden.

    • setHidden

      public void setHidden(Name labelName, boolean hidden)
      Sets the state of the term label with the passed name to hidden or not.
      Parameters:
      labelName - The name of a term label
      hidden - The boolean value whether the term label should be hidden or not
